name: MicrosoftAccess
description: This Test Connection validates the access to Microsoft Access database files (.accdb/.mdb) in local filesystem or S3 bucket.

steps.name: GetAccessFiles
steps.description: Validate that at least one Microsoft Access database file (.accdb or .mdb) exists in the configured location (local path or S3 bucket).
steps.errorMessage: Failed to find Access database files. Please validate the file path or S3 bucket configuration and ensure at least one .accdb or .mdb file exists.
